constraints.layout_style: unstyled div soup with inline styles only

required_complexity_patterns.notes: Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click
Newsletter or login decoy form separate from job application form
Combobox: button or input with aria-haspopup=listbox plus listbox/options
At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element
Label wraps input through nested divs without for attribute

reference_templates.title: Table layout form
reference_templates.notes: Form laid out as HTML table with labels in td cells
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Table layout

reference_templates.title: Micro1 Q label pattern
reference_templates.notes: micro1-inspired step-2 labels like Q2.full name with dot separator
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Micro1 Q labels

reference_templates.title: Split date selects
reference_templates.notes: Start date as three separate day/month/year select elements

Split date selects

Earliest start date

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, small, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click Required: Newsletter or login decoy form separate from job application form Required: Combobox: button or input with aria-haspopup=listbox plus listbox/options Required: At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element Required: Label wraps input through nested divs without for attribute Reference DOM (Table layout form): Form laid out as HTML table with labels in td cells Reference DOM (Micro1 Q label pattern): micro1-inspired step-2 labels like Q2.full name with dot separator Reference DOM (Split date selects): Start date as three separate day/month/year select elements Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: details-accordion, decoy-form, custom-combobox, aria-label-only, label-wraps-deep. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: unstyled div soup with inline styles only. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Table layout form; Micro1 Q label pattern; Split date selects.
